Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Gotcha!Mark v0.1.0 scaffold

Tauri v2 desktop app \(Rust + vanilla JS\) for per-recipient PDF watermarking.

- Rust backend: watermark.rs \(lopdf\), detection.rs \(solo guard\), registry.rs \(SQLite/rusqlite\), contrast.rs \(WCAG 4.5:1 enforcement\), config.rs \(platform dirs\)
- 7 Tauri commands: watermark, detect, contrast check, list/search history, export JSON/CSV
- Frontend: sidebar nav, PDF drop zone, live watermark preview on canvas, click-to-position picker, history table with search and export

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
